title: hieracium subflexile
intro: Hieracium subflexile, also known as the flexible hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subflexile include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
